constituencies.extent: Raipur and Pakhowal K.Cs. and PCs. 117-Khatra Chuharmi, 118-Bhikhi Khatra, 119-Butahri, 120-Jhamat, 121-Siahar, 122-Dhaul Kalan, 132-Saharan Majra, 133-Kulahar, 134-Pohir and 135-Khera in Malaud K.C. in Ludhiana tahsil.
constituencies.name: Qila Raipur
constituencies.note: Name discontinued; Raipur/Pakhowal KCs' geographic adjacency to Malaud KC suggests the territory now sits within Payal (flagged in the source as inferred rather than certain).

constituencies.extent: Ward Nos. 1 to 7, 11, 46 and 47 in Ludhiana City.
constituencies.name: Ludhiana North
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name; wards fully renumbered under the new Ludhiana East Tehsil / Municipal Corporation system.

constituencies.extent: Ward Nos. 23 to 32 and 34 to 37 in Ludhiana City.
constituencies.name: Ludhiana West
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name; wards renumbered.

constituencies.extent: Ward Nos. 8 to 10, 13 to 19, 33 and 43 to 45 in Ludhiana City.
constituencies.name: Ludhiana East
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name; wards renumbered.

constituencies.extent: Ward Nos. 38 to 42 in Ludhiana City, Ludhiana K.C. (excluding PCs. 19-Mittewara, 20-Kariana Kalan, 21-Hawas, 33-Shahabana and 34-Khasi Kalan) and Gill K.C. (excluding PCs. 68-Lohara, 69-70-Gill Nos. 1 and 2, 71-Dhandra, 72-Dad, 73-Lalton Kalan, 74-Mansuran, 75-Dolon Kalan, 76-Bilah and 77-Jassowal) in Ludhiana tahsil.
constituencies.name: Ludhiana Rural
constituencies.note: Name discontinued. The old catch-all Rural seat's territory (plus city growth) was carved into four seats, three of them brand new (Sahnewal, Ludhiana South, Atam Nagar, Ludhiana Central).

constituencies.extent: Payal and Jarg K.Cs. and Malaud K.C. (excluding PCs. 117-Khatra Chuharmi, 118-Bhikhi Khatra, 119-Butahri, 120-Jhamat, 121-Siahar, 122-Dhaul Kalan, 132-Saharan Majra, 133-Kulahar, 134-Pohir and 135-Khera) in Ludhiana tahsil.
constituencies.name: Payal
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name and tehsil; now SC-reserved.

constituencies.extent: Kum Kalan K.C. and PCs. 19-Mattewara, 20-Kariana Kalan, 21-Hawas, 33-Shahabana and 34-Khasi Kalan in Ludhiana K.C. in Ludhiana tahsil; and Machhiwara K.C. in Samrala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Kum Kalan
constituencies.note: Name and SC status discontinued. Koom Kalan KC is explicitly named under the newly created Sahnewal, which is unreserved; the Machhiwara KC fragment likely falls under the Fatehgarh Sahib/Payal boundary (flagged as unconfirmed in the source).

constituencies.extent: Samrala K.C. and PCs. 48-Mansurpur, 49-Lakhanpur, 50-Faraur, 51-Khamanon Kalan, 52-Amrala, 53-Sanghol, 55-Bhambri and 56-Chari in Khamanon Kalan K.C. in Samrala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Samrala
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; the same tehsil-based seat. Its Khamanon KC portion went into the new Bassi Pathana (SC) under Fatehgarh Sahib district.

constituencies.extent: Khanna Kalan K.C. and Khamanon Kalan K.C. (excluding PCs. 48-Mansur Pur, 49-Lakhanpur, 50-Faraur, 51-Khamanon Kalan, 52-Amrala, 53-Sanghol, 55-Bhambri and 56-Chari) in Samrala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Khanna
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name and tehsil, but the seat lost its SC reservation.

constituencies.extent: Anandpur Sahib K.C. (excluding Anandpur Sahib municipality and PCs. 10-Anandpur Sahib, 11-Lamlehri, 12-Jhinjri, 13-Kotla, 14-Paharpur, 15-Daulowal, 16-Kiratpur Sahib and 17-Baruwala) and PCs. 24-Kalwan, 25-Jhuj, 26-Thana, 27-Mawa, 28-Samirowal, 42-Nalhoti, 43-Kahanpur, 44-Bhallan and 45-Nangran Kalmot in Nurpur Bedi K.C. in Anandpur Sahib tahsil.
constituencies.name: Nangal
constituencies.note: Old Nangal's Anandpur Sahib KC portion matches directly; the new Anandpur Sahib's KC list explicitly includes Nangal and Naya Nangal.

constituencies.extent: Anandpur Sahib municipality and PCs. 10-Anandpur Sahib, 11-Lamlehri, 12-Jhinjri, 13-Kotla, 14-Paharpur, 15-Daulowal, 16-Kiratpur Sahib and 17-Baruwala in Anandpur Sahib K.C., Nurpur Bedi K.C. (excluding PCs. 24-Kalwan, 25-Jhuj, 26-Thana, 27-Mawa, 28-Samirowal, 42-Nalhoti, 43-Kahanpur, 44-Bhallan and 45-Nangran Kalmot) in Anandpur Sahib tahsil; and P.Cs. 21-Khwaspur and 22-Ropar in Ropar K.C. and Ghanauli K.C. (excluding PCs. 13-Bari, 14-Bardar, 15-Purkhali, 16-Rampur, 17-Panjola, 18-Bhadal, 19-Fatehpur and 20-Sanana) in Ropar tahsil.
constituencies.name: Anandpur Sahib-Ropar
constituencies.note: The old seat's Nurpur Bedi KC and Ghanauli KC fragments are both explicitly named under the new Rupnagar; 'Ropar' town itself is renamed Rupnagar.

constituencies.extent: Ropar K.C. (excluding PCs. 21-Khwaspur and 22-Ropar), PCs. 13-Bari, 14-Bardar, 15-Purkhali, 16-Rampur, 17-Panjola, 18-Bhadal, 19-Fatehpur and 20-Sanana in Ghanauli K.C., Chamkaur Sahib K.C. and PCs. 62-Bara Sadhupur, 63-Amrali, 64-Oind, 65-Salempur, 66-Bara Samana, 67-Rasulpur, 68-Boor Majra, 69-Sotal and 80-Sarhana in Morinda K.C. in Ropar tahsil.
constituencies.name: Chamkaur Sahib
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name and SC status; Chamkaur Sahib KC carries over directly.

constituencies.extent: Morinda K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 62-Bara Sadhu Pur, 63-Amrali, 64-Oind, 65-Salem Pur, 66-Bara Samana, 67-Rasul Pur, 68-Boor Majra, 69-Sotal and 80-Sarhana) in Ropar tahsil; and Mullanpur and Kurali K.Cs. in Kharar tahsil.
constituencies.name: Morinda
constituencies.note: Despite printing next to the new Kharar, old Morinda's own core KC is explicitly named under the new Chamkaur Sahib (SC); only its Mullanpur/Kurali (Kharar-tehsil) fragment went to the new Kharar.

constituencies.extent: Kharar and Manauli K.Cs. in Kharar tahsil.
constituencies.name: Kharar
constituencies.note: Split: the Kharar-KC portion continues in the new Kharar; the Manauli KC portion most likely landed in S.A.S. Nagar (Mohali), carved directly out of old Kharar tehsil (flagged in the source as inferred).

constituencies.extent: Lalru and Dera Bassi K.Cs. and PCs. 32-Machhli Kalan, 33-Manakpur, 36-Banur, 37-Dharmgarh, 40-Pawala, 41-Hulka, 44-Devi Nagar, 96-Bhankher Pur, 97-Mubarakpur and 98-Sundran in Banur K.C. in Rajpura tahsil.
constituencies.name: Banaur
constituencies.note: Split: old Banur's own Banur KC is explicitly named under the new Rajpura; its Lalru/Dera Bassi KCs became the basis of the newly created Dera Bassi seat.

constituencies.extent: Rajpura K.C. and Banur K.C. (excluding PCs. 32-Machhli Kalan, 33-Manakpur, 36-Banur, 37-Dharmgarh, 40-Pawala, 41-Hulka, 44-Devi Nagar, 96-Bhankher Pur, 97-Mubarakpur and 98-Sundran) in Rajpura tahsil.
constituencies.name: Rajpura
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Rajpura KC explicitly named, merged with old Banur's Banur-KC fragment. Dera Bassi Tehsil was separated to form Dera Bassi (112); other parts now form Ghanaur (113).

constituencies.extent: Mardanpur and Ghanaur K.Cs. in Rajpura tahsil; and Raipur K.C. (excluding PCs. 69-Sanaur, 70-Fatehpur Rajputan, 71-Behal, 72-Bankher, 73-Pur and 74-Karanpur and any area of Patiala municipality in PC. 57-Noor Kherian) in Patiala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Ghanaur
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Mardanpur and Ghanaur KCs both explicitly named in the new seat.

constituencies.extent: Dakala and Ghuram K.Cs. and PCs. 69-Sanaur, 70-Fatehpur Rajputan, 71-Behal, 72-Bankher, 73-Pur and 74-Karanpur in Raipur K.C. in Patiala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Dakala
constituencies.note: Name discontinued as a standalone seat. Dakala KC is explicitly named under the new Samana; the Sanaur/Fatehpur Rajputan/Behal PCs became the basis of the newly created Sanour seat.

constituencies.extent: Shutrana K.C. and PCs. 12-Behmana, 13-Talwandi Malik, 16-Sehajpur Kalan, 17-Kularan, 18-Dhanetha, 19-Kakrala and 20-Nanhera in Samana K.C. in Samana tahsil.
constituencies.name: Shutrana
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name, core KC and SC status.

constituencies.extent: Samana K.C. (excluding PCs. 12-Behmana, 13-Talwandi Malik, 16-Sehajpur Kalan, 17-Kularan, 18-Dhanetha, 19-Kakrala and 20-Nanhera) in Samana tahsil; and Patiala K.C. (excluding Wards 1, 2 and 10 to 35 in Patiala municipality) and any area of PC. 57-Noor Kherian in Raipur K.C. which forms part of Patiala municipality in Patiala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Samana
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Samana KC and Patiala KC fragments explicitly named; absorbed old Dakala's core too.

constituencies.extent: Wards 1, 2 and 10 to 35 in Patiala municipality.
constituencies.name: Patiala Town
constituencies.note: Ward numbers largely match the new Patiala directly; some outer wards/OG areas feed the newly created Patiala Rural seat.

constituencies.extent: Nabha and Kakrala K.Cs. and PCs. 1-Sahauli, 2-Sakrali, 3-Raisal, 8-Bhadson, 9-Lout, 10-Allowal and 11-Symro in Bhadson K.C. in Nabha tahsil.
constituencies.name: Nabha
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name and core KCs, but the seat gained an SC reservation it didn't have before. Parts (Ajnoda Kalan KC) were transferred to the new Patiala Rural.

constituencies.extent: Amloh K.C. and Bhadson K.C. (excluding PCs. 1-Sahauli, 2-Sakrali, 3-Raisal, 8-Bhadson, 9-Lout, 10-Allowal and 11-Symro in Nabha tahsil) and Chanarthal K.C. (excluding PCs. 26-Jallah, 33-Mullan Pur Kalan and 35-Bhamarsi Zer) in Fatehgarh Sahib tahsil.
constituencies.name: Amloh
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of name and tehsil, but lost its SC reservation; moved administratively into the newly created Fatehgarh Sahib district.

constituencies.extent: Sirhind and Kalaur K.Cs. and PCs. 26-Jallah, 33-Mullan Pur Kalan and 35-Bhamarsi Zer in Chanarthal K.C. in Fatehgarh Sahib tahsil.
constituencies.name: Sirhind
constituencies.note: Name changed to Fatehgarh Sahib to reflect the district's new headquarters town; same tehsil base.

constituencies.extent: Dhuri and Amargarh K.Cs. and PC. 82-Bamal in Sherpur K.C. in Malerkotla tahsil.
constituencies.name: Dhuri
constituencies.note: Split: Dhuri KC explicitly named under the new Dhuri; the Amargarh KC portion explicitly named under the newly created Amargarh.

constituencies.extent: Malerkotla K.C. and PCs. 6-Kanganpur, 7-Dehliz Kalan, 8-Ahmedgarh, 9-Akbarpura, 10-Baurhai, 11-Bhikampur, 12-Kup and 13-Balewal in Ahmedgarh K.C. in Malerkotla tahsil.
constituencies.name: Malerkotla
constituencies.note: Malerkotla KC carries over directly; its Ahmedgarh KC fragment moved into the newly created Amargarh.

constituencies.extent: Sherpur K.C. (excluding PC. 82-Bamal), Alal K.C. and Ahmedgarh K.C. (excluding PCs. 6-Kanganpur, 7-Dehliz Kalan, 8-Ahmedgarh, 9-Akbarpura, 10-Baurhai, 11-Bhikampur, 12-Kup and 13-Balewal) in Malerkotla tahsil.
constituencies.name: Sherpur

constituencies.extent: Barnala K.C. and PCs. 11-Manal, 12-Thuliwal and 13-Hamidi in Mahal Kalan K.C. in Barnala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Barnala
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Barnala KC carries over, now under the new Barnala district.

constituencies.extent: Bhadaur K.C., Mahal Kalan K.C. (excluding PCs. 11-Manal, 12-Thuliwal and 13-Hamidi) and PCs. 60-Dhilwan Nabha, 61-Dhilwan Patiala, 62 and 63-Mauran Nabha A & B, 64-Mauran Patiala and 65-Ugoke in Tappa K.C. in Barnala tahsil.
constituencies.name: Bhadaur
constituencies.note: Name and SC status continue in the new Bhadaur (SC); the bulk of old Mahal Kalan KC resurfaces as the new Mehal Kalan (SC) seat — a name echo, not the same seat.

constituencies.extent: Dhanaula K.C. and Tappa K.C. (excluding PCs. 60-Dhilwan Nabha, 61-Dhilwan Patiala, 62 and 63-Mauran Nabha A & B, 64-Mauran Patiala and 65-Ugoke) in Barnala tahsil; and PCs. 24-Dhadria, 29-32-Longowal (A, B, C & D), 39-Togawal and 40-Mander Khurd in Longowal K.C. in Sangrur tahsil.
constituencies.name: Dhanaula
constituencies.note: Name discontinued as a standalone seat. Dhanaula KC explicitly absorbed into the new Barnala; its Longowal KC fragment explicitly absorbed into the new Sunam.

constituencies.extent: Sangrur K.C. and Bhawanigarh K.C. (excluding PCs. 6-Bijalpur, 7-Basi Arkh, 11-Bhatiwal Kalan, 16-Phumanwal, 17-Bharoo, 18-Kheri Gillan, 19-Chanon, 20-Nadampur, 21-Balial, 22-Balad Khurd and 23-Balad Kalan) in Sangrur tahsil.
constituencies.name: Sangrur
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Sangrur KC and Bhawanigarh KC both explicitly carry over.

constituencies.extent: P.Cs. 6-Bijalpur, 7-Basi Arkh, 11-Bhatiwal Kalan, 16-Phumanwal, 17-Bharoo, 18-Kheri Gillan, 19-Chanon, 20-Nadampur, 21-Balial, 22-Balad Khurd and 23-Balad Kalan in Bhawanigarh K.C. in Sangrur tahsil; and Dirbha K.C. and P.Cs. 56-Khadiyal, 57-Mahlan, 58-Mauran, 59-60-Chhajli (A & B), 67-Chatha Nanhera and 69-Bigerwal in Sunam K.C. in Sunam tahsil.

constituencies.note: Its Bhawanigarh-KC portion went to the new Sangrur; the core Dirba KC resurfaces as the newly SC-reserved Dirba (SC).

constituencies.extent: Longowal K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 24-Dhadrian, 29-32-Longowal (A, B, C & D), 39-Togawal and 40-Mander Khurd) in Sangrur tahsil; and Sunam K.C. (excluding PCs. 56-Khadiyal, 57-Mahlan, 58-Mauran, 59-60-Chhajli (A & B), 67-Chatha Nanhera and 69-Bigerwal) and PCs. 22-Kanakwal Bhangwan, 23-Daska, 26-Gaga, 27-Sangatpura, 30-Nangla and 36-Haryao in Lehra Gaga K.C. in Sunam tahsil.
constituencies.name: Sunam
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of core; both its Longowal KC and Sunam KC portions explicitly named under the new Sunam; a Lehra Gaga-KC fragment went to the new Lehra.

constituencies.extent: Moonak K.C. and Lehra Gaga K.C. (excluding PCs. 22-Kanakwal Bhangwan, 23-Daska, 26-Gaga, 27-Sangatpura, 30-Nangla and 36-Haryao) in Sunam tahsil.
constituencies.name: Lehra
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Moonak KC (old Lehra's core) explicitly named under the new Lehra.

constituencies.extent: PCs. 27-Jandwala Beemeshah, 28-Arniwala Sheikh Subhan, 29-Ghuriana and 30-Tahliwala Jattan in Fazilka Shamali K.C. and P.Cs. 50-Dharangwala, 51-Kundal, 52-Balluana, 53-Dhaban Kokarian, 54-Sardarpura, 55-Seeto Gano, 56-Khuban, 57-Bazidpur, 58-Kalaran, 59-Rajjanwali, 60-Wahabwala, 61-Kala Tibba, 62-Azeem Garh (excluding any part of Abohar municipality) and 65-Jhurarkhera in Abohar K.C. in Fazilka tahsil.

constituencies.extent: Abohar municipality and Abohar K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 50-Dharangwala, 51-Kundal, 52-Balluana, 53-Dhaban Kokarian, 54-Sardarpura, 55-Seeto Gano, 56-Khuban, 57-Bazidpur, 58-Kalaran, 59-Rajjanwali, 60-Wahabwala, 61-Kala Tibba, 62-Azeem Garh and 65-Jhurarkhera) in Fazilka tahsil.
constituencies.name: Abohar
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of the core town/KC; Abohar municipality and Abohar (Rural)/Abohar Mandi explicitly named in the new Abohar.

constituencies.extent: Fazilka Janubi K.C. in Fazilka tahsil.
constituencies.name: Fazilka
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; the Fazilka KC/municipality explicitly named in the new Fazilka.

constituencies.extent: Jalalabad K.C. and Fazilka Shamali K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 27-Jandwala Beemeshah, 28-Arniwala Sheikh Subhan, 29-Ghuriana and 30-Tahliwala Jattan) in Fazilka tahsil.
constituencies.name: Jalalabad
constituencies.note: Direct continuity, plus absorbed fragments that used to sit in old Balluana's KC list (Tahliwala Bodla, Arniwala Sheikh Subhan).

constituencies.extent: Guru Har Sahai K.C. and Mamdot K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 45-Wahagke, 46-Wahage Wala, 47-Lakha Hajji and 48-Panjoke Uttar) in Ferozepur tahsil.
constituencies.name: Guru Har Sahai
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; Guru Har Sahai KC and Mamu/Mahmu Joyian explicitly named in the new Guru Har Sahai.

constituencies.extent: Ferozepur municipality and Ferozepur K.C. constituencies.name: Ferozepur
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of the core as Firozpur City, but the seat as a whole is now split with Firozpur Rural.

constituencies.extent: Ferozepur Cantonment, P.Cs. 20-Bhangar, 21-Malwal, 22-Bazidpur, 23-Jhok Hari Har, 25-Satiya Wala and 27-Waloor in Ferozepur K.C. and Feru Shaihar K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 1-Bundala, 2-Dula Singh Wala, 3-Ilame Wala, 4-Arafke, 5-Masteke, 6-Mahlam and 7-Changali Qadeem) in Ferozepur tahsil.
constituencies.name: Ferozepur Cantonment
constituencies.note: The Firozpur Cantt. KC is explicitly named in the new Firozpur Rural (SC); its Mamdot-KC PCs also reappear there. The old Cantonment seat was unreserved; the new Firozpur Rural is SC-reserved.

constituencies.extent: Makhu K.C. and Zira K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 35-Manawan, 36-Talwandi Jallekhan, 37-Mehal, 38-Katora, 39-Karahewala, 40-Jhanda Bagga Purana and 41-Mander) in Zira tahsil.
constituencies.name: Zira
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of the core (Zira tehsil is the entirety of the new Zira); its excluded PCs (Manawan, Talwandi Jallekhan, etc.) went to Dharamkot.

constituencies.extent: Dharamkot and Kot Isekhan K.Cs. and P.Cs. 35-Manawan, 36-Talwandi Jallekhan, 37-Mehal, 38-Katora, 39-Karahewala, 40-Jhanda Bagga Purana and 41-Mander in Zira K.C. in Zira tahsil.
constituencies.name: Dharamkot
constituencies.note: Old Dharamkot (SC) loses its reservation; the new Dharamkot (74) is unreserved and is built from fragments of old Dharamkot (SC) and old Moga.

constituencies.extent: Moga municipality and Moga Mehla Singh K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 42-43-Buttar (Nos. 1 and 2), 44-45-Daudhar (Nos. 1 and 2) and 46-Maliana) in Moga tahsil.
constituencies.name: Moga
constituencies.note: The new Moga and new Bhagha Purana both draw simultaneously from old Moga and old Bagha Purana — a genuine two-way split on both sides.

constituencies.extent: Moga Jit Singh K.C. (excluding any part of Moga municipality) and P.Cs. 74-Gholia Kalan, 75-Kaleke, 76-Bagha Purana, 77-Langiana Nawan, 78-Nathu Wala, 79-Mahla Kalan and 80-Bhaloor in Bagha Purana K.C. in Moga tahsil.
constituencies.name: Bagha Purana
constituencies.note: Continues as Bhagha Purana Tehsil-based seat; fragments also feed Nihal Singhwala.

constituencies.extent: Nihal Singh Wala K.C., P.Cs. 42-43-Buttar (Nos. 1 and 2), 44-45-Daudhar (Nos. 1 and 2) and 46-Maliana in Moga Mehla Singh K.C., and P.Cs. 71-72-Manuke (Nos. 1 and 2) and 73-Gholia Khurd in Bagha Purana K.C. in Moga tahsil.
constituencies.name: Nihal Singh Wala
constituencies.note: The one clean continuity case in this belt: full KC/PC carryover, SC status preserved.

constituencies.extent: Bagha Purana K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 71-72-Manuke (Nos. 1 and 2), 73-Gholia Khurd, 74-Gholia Kalan, 75-Kaleke, 76-Bagha Purana, 77-Langiana Nawan, 78-Nathu Wala, 79-Mahla Kalan and 80-Bhaloor) in Moga tahsil; Kot Kapura K.C. (excluding Kot Kapura municipality and P.Cs. 18-Daggo Romana, 19-Machaki Mal Singh, 20-Pakka, 21-Chand Baja, 25-Wander Jatana, 26-Khara, 27-Hari Nau, 28-Kot Kapura and 34-Bargari) in Faridkot tahsil.
constituencies.name: Panjgrain
constituencies.note: Most of the former Panjgrain (SC) was merged into the new Jaitu (SC); its own Panjgrain Kalan KC is explicitly named there, SC status preserved.

constituencies.extent: Jaitu K.C. and Kot Kapura municipality and P.Cs. 28-Kot Kapura and 34-Bargari in Kot Kapura K.C. in Faridkot tahsil.
constituencies.name: Kot Kapura
constituencies.note: Mostly continuity (Kotkapura KC/municipality explicitly named in the new Kotkapura), but the seat sheds its Jaitu-area piece into a separate new SC-reserved Jaitu.

constituencies.extent: Faridkot K.C. and P.Cs. 18-Daggo Romana, 19-Machaki Mal Singh, 20-Pakka, 21-Chand Baja, 25-Wander Jatana, 26-Khara and 27-Hari Nau in Kot Kapura K.C. in Faridkot tahsil.
constituencies.name: Faridkot
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; the Faridkot KC/municipality explicitly named in the new Faridkot.

constituencies.extent: Muktsar K.C. (excluding P.Cs. 15-Ropana, 16-Bhagsar, 17-Lakhewali, 18-Gander and 19-Bhang Jari) in Muktsar tahsil.
constituencies.name: Muktsar
constituencies.note: Direct continuity of the core; its excluded PCs (Lakhewali etc.) resurface under KC Lakhewali in the new Malout.

constituencies.extent: Giddar Baha K.C. in Muktsar tahsil.
constituencies.name: Giddar Baha
constituencies.note: Direct continuity; the Gidderbaha KC/municipality explicitly named in the new Gidderbaha.

constituencies.extent: Malout municipality and P.Cs. 37-Jandwala Charat Singh, 38-Malout, 39-Katore Wala, 40-Jhurer, 41-Tarkhan Wala and 42-Bam in Malout K.C. and P.Cs. 15-Ropana, 16-Bhagsar, 17-Lakhewali, 18-Gander and 19-Bhang Jari in Muktsar K.C. in Muktsar tahsil.

name: Punjab
intro: For three decades, Punjab's Assembly elections were fought on these 117 constituencies. The 2008 Delimitation Commission redrew the map, but the constituencies it replaced remain central to election records, political history and archival research. This archive reconstructs those boundaries and documents what changed.
The assembly map Punjab retired in 2008
post_order: Delimitation of Parliamentary and Assembly Constituencies Order, 2008
map_caveats: 116 of 117 pre-2008 seats are drawn from the digitised ECI sheet; Dakala (73), not digitised separately in the source, is approximated with the 2008 Sanour polygon and rendered dashed.
data_flags: SC-status conflict between curated records and digitised shapefile attributes on three pre-2008 seats: 8 Dina Nagar, 9 Narot Mehra and 110 Pakka Kalan (records say GEN; shapefile says SC). Records carried as authoritative.
pre_order: Delimitation of Parliamentary and Assembly Constituencies Order, 1976
footnotes: Mansa split from Bathinda district in 1992 — before the delimitation, separate from it.
Tarn Taran, S.A.S. Nagar (Mohali), Barnala and Nawan Shahr districts date from the mid-2000s reorganisation and frame the 2008 order.
Fazilka district was created in 2011; its seats were delimited under Firozpur.
Pathankot district (2016) and Malerkotla district (2021) post-date the delimitation; their seats are shown under Gurdaspur and Sangrur.
history: Between 1977 and 2007, every Punjab Assembly election was contested on these 117 constituencies. The 2008 delimitation redrew the state's electoral map. Here, the original boundaries are reconstructed, compared with the map that replaced them, and linked seat by seat.

The Delimitation Act, 2002 constituted a fresh Delimitation Commission, working to the 2001 Census. Its final order for Punjab took effect in 2008 and redrew all 117 constituencies within the same total, redistributing seats towards districts whose populations had grown and reworking the map onto the district framework that had emerged from the reorganisations of the 1990s and 2000s. The 2012 election was the first fought on the new boundaries; they remain in force.
title: The Electoral Map of Punjab (1977–2007)
sources: Delimitation of Parliamentary and Assembly Constituencies Order, 1976
Delimitation of Parliamentary and Assembly Constituencies Order, 2008
District-wise Analysis of Punjab Assembly Constituencies Before and After the 2008 Delimitation
Census of India 1981, Punjab Atlas, Map 2
